info.english_meaning: to spit to rinse the mouth
info.hindI_arTa: KAnA nigalanA grahaRa karanA lenA adarSana honA nahIM diKAI denA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: AdAne ityeke  adarSane iti dramiqAH iti DAtuvfttiH  svAmikASyapA kASyapAdimatAnusAreRa ayaM DAtuH mADavIyAdizu paWitaH
